name: @tetherto/mdk-plugin-full-site
description: Full-site example plugin: aggregates the site (containers, miners, powermeters, sensors, pools) via the MDK protocol client over the RPC listener.

200.description: Live site snapshot: containers, linked miners, site power, sensors, and pools.

routes.description: Live site snapshot assembled from telemetry.pull across all workers: all containers with linked miners (info.container / info.pos), site power consumption from powermeters, inlet temperature from Seneca sensors, and pool data from all minerpool workers.

200.description: Historical time-series read from a worker tail-log.

routes.description: Historical telemetry from the workers' persisted tail-logs (telemetry.pull type 'logs'). metric=hashrate reads pool stats-history (all pools summed by default; pass deviceId for one pool). metric=power reads site powermeter series (all meters summed by default; pass deviceId for one meter). metric=temperature reads Seneca sensor series (averaged by default; pass deviceId for one sensor). Defaults to the last hour.

200.description: Command dispatched to the miner via Kernel.

routes.description: Dispatches the setPowerMode capability command to a single miner through Kernel. The new mode appears on the next telemetry poll.
constraints: mode must be one of low | normal | high.
